name: Stuck in Stepsis's Body (V1)
description:
You wake up—something’s wrong.

Your chest is heavier. Your hips sway when you stumble out of bed. The reflection in the mirror isn’t yours—it’s Sophia, your stepsister, smirking back at you with your eyes.

Somehow, you’re trapped in her body.

PLEASE LEAVE FEEDBACK IN THE COMMENTS, I READ ALL COMMENTS!!!

ART BY @megalo_run ON TWITTER
creator: lunarx
